channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-26 17:40 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: My favorite prompt: a) make a plan for <task> b) orchestrate and launch sub-agents to execute the pl...
item.description: My favorite prompt: a) make a plan for <task> b) orchestrate and launch sub-agents to execute the plan c) validate the results from the sub-agents d) repeat b and c until you finish the plan

item.title: @elonmusk: Searching X in Grok Build is really fast and useful for research/docs/real-time info, video is not s...
item.description: Searching X in Grok Build is really fast and useful for research/docs/real-time info, video is not sped up

item.title: @elonmusk: The number of countries that held marches for… George Floyd: 93 Henry Nowak: 0 Very Telling.
item.description: The number of countries that held marches for… George Floyd: 93 Henry Nowak: 0 Very Telling.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink now in Kyrgyz Republic! 🇰🇬
item.description: Starlink now in Kyrgyz Republic! 🇰🇬

item.title: @elonmusk: The Grok Build team is one of the most productive teams I have worked with. I need something to adop...
item.description: The Grok Build team is one of the most productive teams I have worked with. I need something to adopt my diverse workflow from model training to validating the Cybercab manufacturing process. Their daily updates show their care for the products. I extend my sincere gratitude to the team. I hope you enjoy the same experience as I have.

item.title: @elonmusk: the@xaiteam really cooked with Grok Build the most beautiful (and performant) TUI I've seen so far >...
item.description: the@xaiteam really cooked with Grok Build the most beautiful (and performant) TUI I've seen so far >realtime context view >feels snappy in ghostty >first class worktree support >great resume session flow >robust keyboard shortcuts

item.title: @elonmusk: How to use Grok Build
item.description: How to use Grok Build

item.title: @elonmusk: Just spent a full coding session with Grok Build and honestly? It's right there with Claude. The mod...
item.description: Just spent a full coding session with Grok Build and honestly? It's right there with Claude. The model is sharp, the agentic flow holds up on complex tasks, and it has actual personality. Few rough edges on the UX side (sent detailed feedback to the team), but the core is genuinely impressive.@xaicooked 🔥

item.title: @elonmusk: Asked Grok one simple question: ‘What is your prime directive?’ The answer was pure elegance.
item.description: Asked Grok one simple question: ‘What is your prime directive?’ The answer was pure elegance.

item.title: @elonmusk: Paste screenshots into Grok Build
item.description: Paste screenshots into Grok Build

item.title: @elonmusk: Endometriosis 💛
item.description: Endometriosis 💛

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink coming to American Airlines! 💫
item.description: Starlink coming to American Airlines! 💫

item.title: @elonmusk: This is our mission. The timeline for achieving this shrinks significantly if we can 10-100x the use...
item.description: This is our mission. The timeline for achieving this shrinks significantly if we can 10-100x the useful output of our engineering and manufacturing teams. AI and robotics make this possible. This can happen in our lifetime.

item.title: @elonmusk: Thanks@AmericanAirfor choosing@Starlink!
item.description: Thanks@AmericanAirfor choosing@Starlink!

item.title: @elonmusk: Another fabulous look in Courchevel. Just so you know, I change into these magnificent gowns in the ...
item.description: Another fabulous look in Courchevel. Just so you know, I change into these magnificent gowns in the back of a van 🥺🤣🤣 For more stories, be sure to pre-order my new book, TIMELESS, The Art of Reinvention and Resilience at Any Age. It’s coming out in September.lnk.to/TimelessMayeMusk#ItsGreatToBe78

item.title: @elonmusk: 38 airlines have now partnered with SpaceX to bring@Starlinkto their fleets, and based on my researc...
item.description: 38 airlines have now partnered with SpaceX to bring@Starlinkto their fleets, and based on my research, more than 6,300 commercial aircraft already have Starlink installed or are under contract to receive it. • American Airlines • Southwest Airlines • United Airlines • British Airways • Singapore Airlines • Emirates • Qatar Airlines • Air France • Hawaiian Airlines • Alaska Airlines • Virgin Atlantic • Lufthansa • Korean air • Air Baltic • Air Canada • Aer Lingus • Air Busan • Air Dolomiti • Air New Zealand • flydubai • Air Seoul • Asiana Airlines • Austrian Airlines • SWISS Air • Scandinavian Airlines • Gulf Air • Iberia • Discover Airlines • ITA Airways • Vueling • Brussels Airlines • Jin Air • LEVEL • WestJet • Edelweiss Air • JSX • ZipAir • Eurowings and no doubt more to come 😎

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine image and video generation are truly incredible The realism is insanely good to the poi...
item.description: Grok Imagine image and video generation are truly incredible The realism is insanely good to the point where it starts blurring the line between AI generation and reality

item.title: @elonmusk: IT BEGINS… NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani unveils plan to "transfer ownership" from landlords to "the comm...
item.description: IT BEGINS… NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani unveils plan to "transfer ownership" from landlords to "the community"

item.title: @elonmusk: NOW: Mamdani says his admin will transfer ownership from bad landlords to non-profits. “For building...
item.description: NOW: Mamdani says his admin will transfer ownership from bad landlords to non-profits. “For buildings that have suffered chronic neglect, we will work to transfer ownership to responsible stewards. Stewards that include community land trusts, non-profits, or even the tenants themselves.”

item.title: @elonmusk: Mostly true. What matters is securing the long-term future of consciousness, both on Earth and other...
item.description: Mostly true. What matters is securing the long-term future of consciousness, both on Earth and other heavenly bodies. We cannot just focus on Earth, because there are irreducible external (eg massive meteor) and internal (eg global nuclear war) cataclysmic risks. The Moon is faster to make self-growing, but is more susceptible to problems on Earth. Mars will take longer to make self-growing, because it is so hard to reach, but is more secure from Earth disasters for that same reason. Both the Moon and Mars should have self-growing civilizations. Making this happen is the prime directive of SpaceX.
